---
name: Bug Report 🐛
about: Create a bug report to help us fix unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command / code snippet
2. Parameters used (e.g. fps, font, width/height settings)
3. Full error message / stack trace if available
4. Screenshots if applicable

### Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

### Actual behavior
What actually happened.

### Environment
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, 22H2)
- Python version:
- termgif version:
- Dependencies version (pyte, Pillow, pywinpty):

### Additional context
Any other context, logs, or workarounds you've found.
